title: taraxacum palustrisquameum
intro: Taraxacum palustrisquameum, also known as marsh dandelion or swamp dandelion, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family, Asteraceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating conditions such as arthritis, kidney stones, and liver disorders. The health benefits of Taraxacum palustrisquameum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, as well as providing relief from fever and congestion. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and detoxification.
